visual_description: A man in a beige jacket stands near a hospital bed, holding a curtain open with one hand while looking toward the bed. A woman with short hair lies in the bed, propped up with her hands behind her head, partially obscured by the curtain. The scene is a hospital room with medical equipment visible, including an IV stand and a wall-mounted device.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in a quiet environment with no background noise.
